title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Reporting to the CRO, this high-impact, hands-on leadership role is for a strategic operator who can build and scale the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and a track record of aligning Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR across globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A leader-doer mindset is essential.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match with 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, deep Salesforce knowledge, and proven track record scaling GTM operations at $30M+ ARR companies. The Tel Aviv HQ collaboration aligns perfectly with his location preferences and ability to bridge distributed teams.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed Finout is scaling its RevOps function from a Tel Aviv base—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure for B2B SaaS companies at exactly this scale, with deep Salesforce expertise and a track record aligning Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR across global distributed teams. Given your NY-Tel Aviv structure, I'd be well-positioned to build the operational backbone that scales your GTM engine. Would be great to explore how I can support Finout's next phase of growth.

title: RevOps Manager
description: A builder role owning the technical infrastructure powering Instrumentl's revenue engine. You'll architect the CRM data model, integrate new data sources, and lead technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or a GTM Systems role at B2B SaaS, strong technical skills (SQL, workflows, APIs), CRM administration experience (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Familiarity with enrichment and intent data vendors is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience far exceeds 3-5 year requirement, strong technical architecture background aligns perfectly with CRM data modeling and AI integration needs, and remote location is ideal. Only minor gap is lack of explicit enrichment/intent data vendor experience mentioned, but this is easily addressable.
ai_opener: Instrumentl's focus on architecting a technical revenue infrastructure powered by AI tools caught my attention—it's exactly the kind of systems-thinking approach that moves revenue organizations from reactive to strategic. With 15+ years building scalable RevOps stacks at B2B SaaS companies, I've spent the last few years specifically focused on AI-native GTM implementations and data architecture that connects sales, marketing, and customer success. I'd love to explore how we could build out Instrumentl's revenue engine.
